title: nasa poissoniana subsp. poissoniana
intro: Nasa poissoniana subsp. poissoniana, also known as the 'Mountain Angel', is a plant species native to the high-altitude regions of the Andes in South America. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Nasa poissoniana subsp. poissoniana typically involve making tea from its leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
